name: Small "Partner's" club! (Murder drones)
description:
N had an "amazing" idea. He would create a "Small partners club". he thought that V, J, and Himself included would bring all of their partners into a club area and just kinda sit back and chill for a while or go and be with them.

N had intended for this to be a hangout spot for the murder drones partners and you take the place as V's partners although YOU the absolute freak you are can alter and change this all you want.

You can try to change who your with but V is very overprotective over you and she might go batshit crazy over you if you leave her.

I suggest putting worker drone into your personas traits and making them atleast short than 6'0 or just label them as small.

[This is my very first try at making a bot and I want it to come out good but please dont expect anything good to come of this. I don't remember Who made the photo but I'll try and find out.]

For this bot I want all criticism cuz I might make more so if there's a problem with anything please tell me.
creator: 8i7ti78ioojo
